query: Group users by their sign-up month to track retention
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    time_period='month',
    format_cohorts=True,
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d'
)

instructions.business_case: SaaS & Subscription Business - Track how user retention varies by acquisition month to understand seasonal patterns, product changes impact, and long-term engagement trends.
natural_language_questions: How does user retention differ between users who signed up in different months?
Are users who joined in January more likely to stay than those who joined in July?
Which signup months have the best long-term retention?
How has user stickiness changed over time?

configuration_hints.time_period: month = good for seasonal analysis, week = short-term campaigns, quarter = business planning
configuration_hints.format_cohorts: true = readable labels, false = faster processing for large datasets
configuration_hints.datetime_format: Must match your date column format exactly

typical_parameters.minimum_cohort_size: 100+ users per cohort for reliable insights

query: Segment users based on their registration quarter for annual analysis
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='registration_date',
    cohort_column='registration_quarter',
    time_period='quarter',
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'
)

instructions.business_case: Enterprise & B2B Analysis - Analyze customer behavior by business quarters to align with budget cycles, seasonal business patterns, and annual planning processes.
natural_language_questions: How do customers acquired in Q1 perform compared to Q4 acquisitions?
Which quarters bring in the most valuable long-term customers?
Are there seasonal differences in customer behavior?
How does our annual customer acquisition strategy affect retention?

configuration_hints.time_period: quarter aligns with business planning and financial reporting cycles
configuration_hints.cohort_column: Custom name for the cohort grouping column
configuration_hints.datetime_format: Include time component if your data has timestamps

query: Create weekly cohorts from user first purchase dates
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='first_purchase_date',
    time_period='week',
    format_cohorts=True,
    cohort_column='purchase_week_cohort'
)

instructions.business_case: E-commerce & Retail - Track purchase behavior and repeat buying patterns for users who made their first purchase in different weeks, useful for measuring campaign effectiveness and conversion optimization.
natural_language_questions: How quickly do first-time buyers make their second purchase?
Which weeks brought in customers with the best repeat purchase rates?
How do promotional campaigns affect long-term buying behavior?
What's the difference in behavior between customers acquired during sales vs regular periods?

configuration_hints.time_period: week = good for marketing campaign analysis and short-term behavior tracking
configuration_hints.date_column: Use first purchase date rather than signup date for purchase-focused analysis
configuration_hints.cohort_column: Descriptive name helps distinguish from other cohort analyses

typical_parameters.key_metrics: Repeat purchase rate, time to second purchase, customer lifetime value

query: Create customer segments based on initial subscription plan

instructions.business_case: Subscription Business Model Optimization - Compare retention and engagement across different pricing tiers to optimize pricing strategy, feature allocation, and upgrade paths.
natural_language_questions: Do premium subscribers have better retention than basic plan users?
How do different subscription tiers behave over time?
Which pricing plan leads to the highest customer lifetime value?
Are free trial users converting to paid plans at expected rates?

configuration_hints.custom_cohorts: Group similar plans together for cleaner analysis (e.g., all premium tiers)
configuration_hints.behavior_column: The column containing subscription plan names or IDs
configuration_hints.cohort_column: New column name for the grouped cohorts

typical_parameters.analysis_focus: Retention rates, upgrade patterns, revenue per cohort

query: Calculate 3-month retention rates for each user acquisition channel
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention(
    cohort_column='acquisition_channel',
    date_column='activity_date',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    time_period='month',
    max_periods=3,
    retention_type='rolling'
)

instructions.business_case: Marketing Channel Optimization - Compare the quality of users from different acquisition sources (paid ads, organic, referrals) to optimize marketing spend and channel strategy.
natural_language_questions: Which marketing channels bring in users who stick around longest?
Are paid advertising users as valuable as organic users?
How do retention rates compare between different acquisition sources?
Which channels should we invest more in based on user quality?

configuration_hints.retention_type: rolling = considers any activity, classic = only specific events
configuration_hints.max_periods: 3 months good for initial assessment, 12+ for full lifecycle

typical_parameters.key_insights: Channel ROI, user quality, marketing attribution

query: Analyze conversion from trial to paid subscription for each pricing tier
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion(
    cohort_column='pricing_tier',
    event_column='user_action',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    funnel_steps=['trial_started', 'feature_used', 'paywall_viewed', 'subscription_purchased'],
    step_names=['Trial', 'Feature Usage', 'Paywall', 'Purchase'],
    include_rates=True
)

instructions.business_case: Freemium to Paid Conversion Optimization - Understand how different pricing tiers and user segments convert from free trials to paid subscriptions to optimize conversion funnels.
natural_language_questions: Which pricing tiers have the best trial-to-paid conversion rates?
Where in the conversion funnel do users drop off most?
How do different user segments respond to pricing tiers?
What steps can we take to improve trial conversion?

configuration_hints.funnel_steps: Order matters - list events in chronological sequence
configuration_hints.step_names: Human-readable names for reporting and visualization
configuration_hints.include_rates: true = shows conversion percentages between steps

typical_parameters.typical_conversion_rates: Trial to paid: 15-25% for SaaS products

query: Track 6-month cumulative revenue for each geographical region
example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_lifetime_value(
    cohort_column='region',
    date_column='transaction_date',
    user_id_column='customer_id',
    value_column='revenue',
    time_period='month',
    max_periods=6,
    cumulative=True
)

instructions.business_case: Geographic Revenue Analysis - Compare customer value across different regions to inform market expansion, pricing strategies, and resource allocation decisions.
natural_language_questions: Which geographic regions generate the most revenue per customer?
How does customer lifetime value vary by location?
Are customers in certain regions more valuable over time?
Where should we focus our expansion efforts?

configuration_hints.cumulative: true = running total over time, false = period-by-period values
configuration_hints.max_periods: 6 months good for initial assessment, 12+ for full lifecycle
configuration_hints.value_column: Any monetary value - revenue, profit, purchase amount

typical_parameters.analysis_applications: Market expansion, pricing strategy, resource allocation
